reason: Successfully navigated to agent, verified idle status, sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?", received response "4." confirming correct answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agent list.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260415-211444-hi50" in sidebar — Agent page opened and displayed agent details.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status showed "idle" which meets the requirement.
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was entered in input box and send button was clicked successfully.
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent processed the request in 3 seconds and transitioned from "working" status back to "idle".

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Agent response displayed "4." which correctly answers the mathematical question, and final screenshot was captured showing the complete conversation.
